examples: The largest living lungfish measures only around 6.5 feet long.
The fossil lungfish is a new species, but a name cannot be given because of its uncertain origin.
Measuring in at over 13 feet long, this lungfish beat out the prior record-holder, an 11.5-foot long lungfish from Africa.
They are the primitive air breathers, such as lungfish, gar and many amphibians that still possess gills.
